nodes.title: HOW TO USE THIS LITE WORKFLOW
widgets_values:
# Full Character Creation Lite v2

1. Character Blueprint now stores separate Clinical Anatomy and Clothed Silhouette body descriptions.
2. Clothing presets are complete outfits: top + bottom + footwear.
3. Exact Outfit Override is placed immediately after framing and ignores anatomy-only notes.
4. Outfit Coverage controls Complete Outfit, Upper/Lower Garment, One-Piece, or Swimwear Set.
5. Clothing Priority Strong/Maximum adds a final visible-garment confirmation.
6. The Stage 0 planner is preconfigured for the ultra micro bikini stress test.
7. Use the three diagnostic boxes to verify effective clothing, body mode, and visibility lock before generating.
8. Qwen reference Set/Get is corrected to IMAGE type.

Clinical anatomy notes such as pubic hair are excluded whenever the effective body mode is Clothed Silhouette.
